turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, I need to book a gynaecology appointment for a routine check-up. Nothing urgent, just a yearly thing.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Of course! For routine gynaecology, Dr. Vineeta Gokhale is excellent. She has openings next Tuesday at 10 AM and Thursday at 4 PM.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thursday 4 PM is good. My name is Shruti Pawar.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Appointment confirmed — Thursday, 4 PM, Dr. Vineeta Gokhale. For a routine check-up, no special preparation is needed, though fasting for a few hours is required if you'd like blood work done during the same visit.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I might want to get the usual panel done. Should I fast?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, we recommend fasting from midnight the night before if you'd like blood tests included. Just let the doctor know at the start of the consultation.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: See you Thursday, Ms. Pawar. Have a great week!
